metadata.description: Product fluency certification for sellers. Master every screen, workflow, and feature of the Informativ platform so you can demo confidently, answer technical questions from F&I directors and GMs, and position the Total Solution as a must-have — not just describe it.

modules.title: Informativ Platform Overview
modules.description: Introduction to Informativ's compliance-first platform, core benefits, and how the Total Solution improves the dealership experience.

questions.question: What is one *key benefit* of using Informativ’s digital signature and license scanning technology?

options.A: It eliminates the need for a finance manager
options.B: It verifies income statements automatically
options.C: It reduces errors and prevents fraud
options.D: It auto-generates inventory updates

questions.question: What does pre-qualification help accomplish?

options.A: It replaces the need for credit checks
options.B: It shows buying ability before a hard pull, protecting credit
options.C: It locks in an interest rate for 60 days
options.D: It guarantees loan approval

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT one of Informativ’s four core focus areas?

options.A: Compliance with regulations
options.B: Preventing fraud
options.C: Increasing ad spend for the dealership
options.D: Saving time and money by reducing paperwork

questions.question: What federal regulation is specifically mentioned in the training as requiring compliance?

options.A: Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act
options.B: FTC Safeguards Rule
options.C: HIPAA
options.D: Fair Credit Reporting Act

questions.question: Why is it important to confirm that the driver’s license information is current during a scan?

options.A: Outdated licenses slow down the app
options.B: It’s required by Informativ’s terms of service
options.C: Accurate information is essential to prevent errors in paperwork
options.D: It lets the customer skip the next step

questions.question: What is the primary reason your dealership has partnered with Informativ?

options.A: To completely change your sales process
options.B: To test out new technology temporarily
options.C: To streamline workflow and improve efficiency without disrupting success
options.D: To monitor employees more closely

questions.question: What message does the training emphasize about Informativ’s impact on the current sales process?

options.A: It will require completely relearning your job
options.B: It will eliminate most existing steps
options.C: It will enhance and speed up what you already do well
options.D: It will require legal certification

questions.question: How does Informativ improve the customer experience in the showroom?

options.A: By offering online car purchases only
options.B: By taking control away from the salesperson
options.C: By giving salespeople more control with digital tools
options.D: By limiting the sales conversation to digital forms

modules.title: Mobile App Fundamentals
modules.description: Driver's license scanning, buyer information population, co-buyer management, and mobile app workflow for customer intake.

questions.question: What is the primary benefit of using the Informativ mobile app to scan a driver's license?

options.A: To upload license images directly to your personal device
options.B: To generate a physical copy for your records
options.C: To avoid speaking with the customer
options.D: To instantly populate buyer information into the digital deal jacket and reduce manual errors

questions.question: Why should you ask if the driver's license information is current during the scan?

options.A: To ensure that all customer data is accurate from the beginning
options.B: To appear more thorough in front of the desk manager
options.C: It is required by state law
options.D: So you can verify it against the CRM manually later

questions.question: Where is the customer’s scanned license data stored after using the mobile app?

options.A: In the car’s internal system
options.B: On the salesperson’s phone
options.C: In a printable PDF saved to the desktop
options.D: Encrypted and securely transmitted to the cloud

questions.question: If you're unable to get a clear image using the mobile app, what should you do?

options.A: Manually write the license information
options.B: Take a picture with your phone camera
options.C: Skip the scan entirely
options.D: Use the desktop scanner as an alternative method

questions.question: When should you typically scan the buyer’s license?

options.A: Only if the customer is financing
options.B: After the test drive and price negotiation
options.C: At the beginning of the interaction, before the test drive
options.D: Before delivery, during final paperwork

questions.question: How can you reassure customers that their information isn’t saved on your personal device?

options.A: By turning your phone off after the scan
options.B: By reading them a legal disclaimer
options.C: You can’t reassure them; it’s a risk they have to take
options.D: The app includes a built-in disclaimer about data storage

questions.question: Why is it important to confirm the scanned information after scanning both sides of a license?

options.A: The app sometimes randomly deletes data
options.B: The buyer's credit score won't update otherwise
options.C: Customers may have outdated or incorrect information that needs correction
options.D: The dealership won't get paid unless it’s reviewed

questions.question: What is the first step when adding a Co-Buyer in the mobile app?

options.A: Call the desk for approval
options.B: Start a new buyer record from scratch
options.C: Find the buyer’s record to attach the Co-Buyer
options.D: Scan the Co-Buyer’s license directly

questions.question: What’s the easiest way to find a buyer in the mobile app before attaching a Co-Buyer?

options.A: Scanning the original contract
options.B: Typing their birthdate
options.C: Typing the first three letters of their last name
options.D: Searching by their phone number

questions.question: What happens if a deal has more than one Co-Buyer?

options.A: It disqualifies the customer from digital verification
options.B: Each Co-Buyer must be added separately using the same process
options.C: Only the primary Co-Buyer can be added
options.D: You must use the desktop app instead

modules.title: Digital Deal Jacket Matching
modules.description: Matching suggestions, duplicate prevention, CRM integration, and deal jacket organization.

questions.question: What is the main purpose of the matching suggestions that appear after scanning a driver's license?

options.A: To offer special discounts to repeat customers
options.B: To eliminate the creation of duplicate digital deal jackets
options.C: To allow you to merge records with other dealerships
options.D: To verify the customer's insurance provider

questions.question: Which of the following may automatically create a digital deal jacket before the customer arrives at the store?

options.A: Filling out a paper form in-store
options.B: Completing a pre-qualification on the Customer Insights Platform
options.C: Test driving a vehicle
options.D: Speaking to a salesperson on the phone

questions.question: Which digital retail platforms mentioned can integrate with Informativ to create a digital deal jacket?

options.A: Dealertrack and eLeads
options.B: AutoTrader and Facebook Marketplace
options.C: Autofy and Roadster
options.D: Google and Apple Maps

questions.question: What should you do when the system shows multiple matching digital deal jacket suggestions?

options.A: Always create a new one to be safe
options.B: Pick the first one on the list
options.C: Thoroughly review them and select the correct existing one
options.D: Ask the desk to choose for you

questions.question: How does selecting the correct existing digital deal jacket benefit the desk manager?

options.A: It saves them from having to print any documents
options.B: It improves their ability to monitor deal progress and ensures documentation is organized
options.C: It sends a notification to the customer automatically
options.D: It activates warranty coverage

questions.question: Why is consolidating customer information into one digital deal jacket important for the customer?

options.A: It builds trust and ensures a smooth, efficient experience
options.B: It allows them to see the car's full accident history
options.C: It automatically sends their info to banks
options.D: It qualifies them for extended test drives

questions.question: If your dealership has integrated CRM support, what happens when you scan a driver’s license?

options.A: It creates a new lead in the CRM
options.B: It automatically emails the customer
options.C: It completes the sale without approval
options.D: It syncs to the finance department

questions.question: How can you communicate professionalism during the matching suggestion process?

options.A: Tell the customer their information may be lost
options.B: Avoid showing them the screen to keep control
options.C: Explain you're ensuring all their info is accurate and secure
options.D: Tell them to wait outside until you finish

questions.question: What kind of information is used to generate matching suggestions for existing digital deal jackets?

options.A: Credit score and loan status
options.B: Name and address
options.C: Social media account
options.D: Purchase history

questions.question: What is a *mechanical benefit* of using the digital deal jacket matching system correctly?

options.A: Avoids syncing with finance tools
options.B: Minimizes duplicate entry errors and improves workflow speed
options.C: Increases customer insurance coverage
options.D: Removes the need for signatures

modules.title: Pre-Qualification & Soft Pulls
modules.description: Soft pull benefits, credit score impact, compliance requirements, and how prequalification accelerates the sales process.

questions.question: What is the purpose of collecting a customer’s phone number before the test drive?

options.A: To send marketing promotions
options.B: To text them a link for pre-qualification (soft pull consent)
options.C: To register their vehicle preferences
options.D: To enroll them in a loyalty program

questions.question: What is a soft pull and how does it differ from a hard credit pull?

options.A: A soft pull affects your credit score temporarily
options.B: A soft pull reveals income information only
options.C: A soft pull doesn't affect your credit score or create obligations
options.D: A soft pull is required for loan approval

questions.question: If a customer hasn't completed a pre-qualification before the test drive, when should you offer it?

options.A: Only after deal paperwork is printed
options.B: Right before delivery of the vehicle
options.C: After the test drive, before discussing financing options
options.D: During the service walkaround

questions.question: What must be obtained from the customer before processing a soft pull in-store?

options.A: Phone number and vehicle of interest
options.B: Driver's license and insurance card
options.C: Verbal consent and birth date
options.D: Their signature on the soft pull consent form

questions.question: What is the main customer benefit of completing a soft pull early in the process?

options.A: It allows them to skip financing entirely
options.B: They can be pre-qualified and receive financing options faster
options.C: It locks in the APR for 90 days
options.D: It removes the need for a co-signer

questions.question: What is a good response if a customer says, 'I don’t want to give my phone number'?

options.A: We need it to send the link, but it's optional to use
options.B: We won’t move forward without it
options.C: You can provide an email instead
options.D: That’s fine, but you’ll lose your deal

questions.question: Which statement best reflects how to handle a customer who says, 'I’m not ready to think about financing yet'?

options.A: That’s okay, it’s just an option for when you're ready
options.B: Then we’ll skip it entirely
options.C: It’s mandatory for a test drive
options.D: We’ll do a hard pull later instead

questions.question: What’s the purpose of using the digital showroom with an iPad if a customer doesn’t pre-qualify via their phone?

options.A: To show the inventory slideshow
options.B: To complete the soft pull consent form in-store
options.C: To print vehicle specs
options.D: To compare service plans

questions.question: Why is it important to explain that a soft pull doesn’t affect credit or commit the customer to anything?

options.A: Because it builds trust and helps address common concerns
options.B: Because soft pulls are confusing
options.C: Because all customers have poor credit
options.D: Because the finance office requires it

questions.question: What message does offering a soft pull early send to the customer?

options.A: You want to upsell them quickly
options.B: You're being proactive and transparent in helping them
options.C: You're avoiding price negotiation
options.D: You’re rushing the process

modules.title: Privacy Notice & Compliance
modules.description: Privacy notice timing, FTC Safeguards Rule, permissible purpose, and compliance workflow.

questions.question: Why is completing the digital privacy notice before a credit application important?

options.A: It helps determine the customer’s down payment
options.B: It provides legally required disclosure of privacy rights before collecting sensitive information
options.C: It speeds up the contract signing
options.D: It is required only for cash buyers

questions.question: What regulation is emphasized as a key reason to handle privacy and compliance steps correctly?

options.A: Fair Credit Reporting Act
options.B: Consumer Privacy Act
options.C: FTC Safeguards Rule
options.D: Dodd-Frank Act

questions.question: When should the privacy notice be completed in the sales process?

options.A: After the credit application is approved
options.B: Before a credit check and after obtaining soft pull consent
options.C: Only if the customer requests it
options.D: When the deal is finalized

questions.question: What are the three documents required to achieve 'permissible purpose'?

options.A: Credit score, insurance info, trade-in value
options.B: Government ID, signed privacy notice, signed credit application
options.C: Customer phone number, soft pull consent, purchase order
options.D: Signed purchase agreement, bank approval, privacy disclaimer

questions.question: What happens if you skip the privacy notice and go straight to the credit app?

options.A: The credit app is auto-approved
options.B: The customer receives a discount
options.C: You’ll be sent back to complete the privacy notice
options.D: The deal closes faster

questions.question: What is one major benefit of completing the privacy notice digitally on an iPad?

options.A: It automatically emails the customer
options.B: It fulfills FTC loan guidelines
options.C: It offers convenience to the customer and ensures secure data storage
options.D: It allows you to skip verification steps

questions.question: How does properly handling the privacy notice impact your relationship with the customer?

options.A: It makes the customer feel rushed
options.B: It builds trust and professionalism
options.C: It prevents the customer from asking questions
options.D: It reduces the need for negotiation

questions.question: What is the proper order for collecting documents to meet compliance standards?

options.A: Signed credit application, privacy notice, government ID
options.B: Privacy notice, credit application, trade-in form
options.C: Driver’s license or ID, privacy notice, credit application
options.D: Government ID, down payment, employment verification

questions.question: Why is it important that the desk manager sees the privacy notice has been completed?

options.A: It ensures they know the customer qualifies
options.B: It confirms that compliance steps have been followed before any credit checks
options.C: It speeds up title processing
options.D: It triggers inventory matching

questions.question: What message does a properly completed privacy notice send to the customer?

options.A: That the process will take longer than expected
options.B: That their information is being taken for marketing use
options.C: That their data is secure and the dealership is professional
options.D: That they must sign immediately

modules.title: Credit Application on iPad
modules.description: iPad credit application process, data security, joint applications, and mobile platform capabilities.

questions.question: Why is using an iPad to complete the credit application beneficial for the customer?

options.A: It connects them directly to the bank
options.B: It allows for a faster, more secure, and customer-friendly experience
options.C: It bypasses the need for signatures
options.D: It sends a physical copy to their home

questions.question: What happens to the customer’s personal information when using the iPad for the credit application?

options.A: It’s stored locally on the device
options.B: It is encrypted and securely transmitted, not stored on the device
options.C: It is sent to marketing teams
options.D: It is saved on the desktop for printing later

questions.question: When completing a joint application, when should both applicants sign?

options.A: One signs at delivery, the other later
options.B: Only the primary applicant signs
options.C: They sign together at the same time
options.D: One signs the credit app, the other signs the privacy notice

questions.question: What should be entered in the 'Other Income' field if the customer has no additional income?

options.A: Leave it blank
options.B: Type N/A or skip
options.C: Enter none or zero (or $1.00 for Dealertrack)
options.D: Ask the customer to sign off

questions.question: Which section will automatically require additional information if the applicant has less than 2 years employment/residency?

options.A: Co-buyer section
options.B: Trade-in form
options.C: Previous employment/residence sections
options.D: Banking section

questions.question: What will happen if 'NA' is left as the default in the 'Arrangement' section?

options.A: The app will auto-correct it
options.B: It will trigger a warning only after submission
options.C: It will result in an error
options.D: It’s acceptable if the buyer has no prior arrangement

questions.question: What is the final step before submitting the completed credit application?

options.A: Scanning the vehicle's VIN
options.B: Having the customer review all fields for accuracy
options.C: Printing the application for review
options.D: Requesting a signature from the sales manager

questions.question: What three steps are required to achieve permissible purpose?

options.A: Test drive, customer ID, digital signature
options.B: Driver’s license, privacy notice, credit application
options.C: Credit check, trade-in estimate, prequal consent
options.D: App store login, signature, appointment setting

questions.question: What’s a good response if a customer says, 'I’m worried about giving my personal information'?

options.A: We only ask for basic details
options.B: The information is encrypted and securely stored, never on the iPad
options.C: We’ve never had a problem before
options.D: It’s required by law, just sign here

questions.question: What’s a good response to a customer who doesn’t want to use the iPad for personal data?

options.A: We can fill it out later if needed
options.B: The iPad helps avoid errors and ensures secure entry; we can walk through it together
options.C: That’s fine, but it will delay the process
options.D: Just sign the printed version instead

questions.question: Why is it important to complete the credit app early if the customer is ready?

options.A: To bypass F&I altogether
options.B: It allows you to match them with a vehicle before a test drive
options.C: It speeds up the financing process and reduces wait time
options.D: So the app can calculate taxes sooner

questions.question: What platform do you use to fill out the credit application on the iPad?

options.A: DealerCRM
options.B: digitalshowroom@sales.dsgss.com
options.C: InformativConnect
options.D: SalesDesk360

modules.title: Remote Pre-Qualifications & Credit Apps
modules.description: Remote engagement features, desk manager benefits, and extending the dealership experience beyond the showroom.

questions.question: What is the main advantage of sending remote pre-qualifications or credit applications?

options.A: It allows customers to apply for warranties online
options.B: It keeps the sales process moving even if the customer isn’t on-site
options.C: It generates leads for third-party vendors
options.D: It removes the need for privacy notices

questions.question: Where can you access the remote prequal or credit app request feature?

options.A: From your CRM system
options.B: From the dealership’s main website
options.C: From the digital showroom at sales.dsgss.com
options.D: Only through the mobile app

questions.question: What happens after the customer completes and submits their remote application?

options.A: The system prints a paper copy for signing
options.B: Their profile is updated in the digital deal jacket
options.C: They must schedule an appointment
options.D: They receive an automatic loan decision

questions.question: Why is remote access to soft pull and credit apps helpful for the desk manager?

options.A: They can conduct financing over the phone
options.B: They get real-time access to results, improving efficiency
options.C: They avoid needing to verify identity
options.D: They can skip compliance steps

questions.question: Which customer types benefit most from remote engagement features?

options.A: Only those with bad credit
options.B: Customers unable to visit the dealership in person
options.C: Repeat buyers only
options.D: Service customers

questions.question: What is the first step in requesting a remote prequal or credit app?

options.A: Search the buyer’s credit score
options.B: Login and select the appropriate tile in the digital showroom
options.C: Scan the customer’s license remotely
options.D: Email a blank PDF form to the customer

modules.title: Digital Showroom & STIPs
modules.description: Deal documents, STIPs requests and tracking, document scanning, and digital showroom workflow.

questions.question: Where do you access deal documents in the Digital Showroom?

options.A: From the CRM tile
options.B: Under the Other Documents section
options.C: From the Credit Application tile
options.D: In the Notes tab

questions.question: What must be confirmed before selecting forms for the deal?

options.A: Customer’s trade-in value
options.B: Customer’s employment status
options.C: That the Privacy Notice has been completed
options.D: That the vehicle has been detailed

questions.question: How are completed forms handled after signing?

options.A: They are emailed to F&I for approval
options.B: They must be manually uploaded to the DMS
options.C: They are automatically stored in the digital deal jacket
options.D: They print immediately at the sales desk

questions.question: If a customer is off-site, how can they submit required documents?

options.A: Email them directly to the desk manager
options.B: Upload them via a secure link sent through the Digital Showroom
options.C: Send a fax to the store
options.D: They cannot submit remotely

questions.question: When is using a scanner preferred over the mobile app?

options.A: When there are many pages to scan
options.B: When the customer has no email
options.C: When working outside business hours
options.D: When scanning photos only

questions.question: What is the benefit of requesting and managing STIPS digitally?

options.A: It eliminates the need for ID verification
options.B: It ensures document collection is fast, secure, and stored in one place
options.C: It locks the customer into financing terms
options.D: It lets customers choose their loan amount

questions.question: How do you search for a customer in the Informativ Mobile app?

options.A: Using their VIN number
options.B: By searching the last 4 digits of their SSN
options.C: By typing the first 3 letters of their first or last name
options.D: Using the inventory search

questions.question: What is the 'Request STIPS' function used for?

options.A: To request a vehicle inspection
options.B: To collect required customer documents like proof of income
options.C: To notify F&I of an upcoming deal
options.D: To initiate trade-in appraisals

questions.question: What must be confirmed before clicking 'Send Request' for STIPS?

options.A: The VIN number of the vehicle
options.B: The sales manager's approval
options.C: The customer's contact information
options.D: The interest rate qualification

questions.question: Where can you track the status of a STIPS submission?

options.A: In the F&I dashboard
options.B: Through your personal email inbox
options.C: In the Digital Showroom STIPS request status section
options.D: On the vehicle detail page

questions.question: What is the main benefit of using digital STIPS collection for both you and the customer?

options.A: It eliminates the test drive requirement
options.B: It reduces the need for lender contact
options.C: It creates a stress-free, flexible process that keeps deals moving
options.D: It automates pricing negotiations

questions.question: What happens to uploaded documents after a customer completes the secure link request?

options.A: They’re sent to the CRM only
options.B: They’re printed for the file
options.C: They’re stored automatically in the digital deal jacket
options.D: They must be forwarded manually to the lender

modules.title: Final Digital Deal Jacket Review
modules.description: Customer detail verification, documentation completeness, and deal jacket audit readiness.

questions.question: Why is it important to review customer details in the digital deal jacket before finalizing a deal?

options.A: To update vehicle inventory
options.B: To ensure nothing is missing and everything is accurate
options.C: To calculate commission early
options.D: To remove the customer’s private data

questions.question: What benefit does the final review provide the customer?

options.A: It confirms their warranty options
options.B: It shows them pricing history
options.C: It provides peace of mind that their info is secure and correct
options.D: It prints their final documents

questions.question: Where do you begin the process of reviewing a customer's digital deal jacket?

options.A: Inside the CRM tool
options.B: In the service drive
options.C: At sales.dsgss.com in the Digital Showroom
options.D: In your mobile text thread

questions.question: What is the easiest way to locate a customer in the Digital Showroom?

options.A: Searching by their city
options.B: Typing the first three letters of their last name
options.C: Looking up their vehicle stock number
options.D: Entering their phone number

questions.question: What limitation might you encounter when reviewing documents in the Digital Deal Jacket?

options.A: You can only review documents from mobile
options.B: You must have manager permission to view document details
options.C: Only buyers, not co-buyers, are visible
options.D: Document previews expire after 24 hours
